content: Self-Refine’s unstructured iterative self-feedback framework can be repurposed to unify fragmented LLM self-reflection mechanisms by treating each existing reflection perspective (like inconsistent solution contrast or multi-view evaluation) as a single refinement step in a cascaded self-improvement loop. This creates a modular plug-and-play system that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data while leveraging the strengths of specialized self-reflection approaches.
